chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا يَجِبُ مِنْ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي كُلِّ مَجْلِسٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – What is Obligated from the Mention of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic in every gathering

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/120)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/120)
text: مَا اجْتَمَعَ فِي مَجْلِسٍ قَوْمٌ لَمْ يَذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ لَمْ يَذْكُرُونَا إِلَّا كَانَ ذَلِكَ الْمَجْلِسُ حَسْرَةً عَلَيْهِمْ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
ثُمَّ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ ذِكْرَنَا مِنْ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ وَ ذِكْرِ عَدُوِّنَا مِنْ ذِكْرِ الشَّيْطَانِ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad Bin Sama’at, from Wuheyb Bin Hafs, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘No group will gather in a gathering not mentioning Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic and not mentioning us<sup>asws</sup> except that gathering would be a regret upon them on the Day of Judgment’.

Then he (the narrator) said, ‘Abu Ja’far<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘Our<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> mention is from the Mention of Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, and the mention of our<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> enemies is from the mention of Satan<sup style="font-weight: normal">la</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 2. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad ibn Sama’a from Wahab ibn Hafs from abu Basir from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “If a people gather together in a place and do not make any mention of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, or of us, that gathering will become a regret for them on the Day of Judgment.’ The Imam then said, ‘Abu Ja’far (a.s.) has said, “To speak of us is to speak of Allah and speaking of our enemy is speaking of Satan.’”
